changes_made.description: Made tab colors match the main button, selected is green with darker unselected

changes_made.change: Added Terms and Conditions click handler
changes_made.description: Fixed click to open modal with terms content

changes_made.change: Added per-field validation with red borders
changes_made.description: Fields show red border immediately when user types and leaves invalid/empty
Validates day (01-31), month (01-12), year (1900-2100) with 4-digit year
Minimum 8 chars, maximum 64, at least 1 number, uppercase+lowercase, special character (!@#$%&*?)

changes_made.change: Added show/hide password icon to Confirmar Senha
changes_made.description: Eye icon toggles visibility for both password fields

changes_made.change: Simplified Terms text to single line
changes_made.description: Made 'Li e aceito os Termos e Condições' one line with clickable link

changes_made.change: Replaced ScrollView with View in login modal
changes_made.description: Prevented swipe to see previous page

changes_made.change: Added reset loginMode to login when opening modal
changes_made.description: Modal always opens on Entrar tab
